name: node-foreground-child
title: node-foreground-child
summary: helper running a child process as a foreground process
description:
helper running a child process as a foreground process
This Node.js module emulate simple control group in pure javacript.
It runs a child process as foreground process redirecting output
to stdout and exiting main process as soon as child exist.
.
This module could be used for implementating TAP test
for Node.js.
.
TAP is a simple text-based interface between testing modules
implemented in many popular languages.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-foreground-child because helper running a child process as a foreground process.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-foreground-child as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-foreground-child with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-foreground-child --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
